title: Vijaya Diagnostics is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Vijaya Diagnostics is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Consultant Physician looking for your next big career move? Vijaya Diagnostics in Vadodara offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Vijaya Diagnostics:
Vijaya Diagnostics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vijaya Diagnostics!
